effects_library.name: Equalize
effects_library.description: Set opponent's CRB equal to this card's CRB.

effects_library.name: Ignore
effects_library.description: Ignore opponent's CRB; deal {val} direct damage.

effects_library.name: Swap
effects_library.description: Swap CRB with target card if it has a higher CRB.

effects_library.name: Persist
effects_library.description: If surviving, return to hand instead of discard.

effects_library.name: Loaded Choice
effects_library.description: Opponent must choose: Discard {val} card OR Lose {val} Life.
